"focused": false, "selected": false, "scrollable-vertical": false, "children": [{"text": "Installing Texture packs: Launch BlockLauncher. In the top-center of the screen you should be seeing a small wrench icon. Tap on it.
 A popup window should appear. Tap on Launcher options (restart required).
 By default the texture pack option will be disabled. Tap on the off button to turn it on.
 Now you will be give two options. Tap on the Select option.
 Tap on the Download folder:sd/games/mojang/resource_packs. In the Download folder you will find all the texture packs which you have downloaded.You should pick the one which you’ve downloaded.
 Texture packs will always be in the a .zip file format and you never have to extract the files yourself. It is all done automatically with BlockLauncher Pro.
 The texture pack is now enabled.
 Installing Mods scripts(.js files):
 Launch Minecraft Pocket Edition and open up the BlockLauncher menu and select “Manage ModPE Scripts”.
 Select “Import”.
 Select “Local storage”.
 Select the “Download” folder:sd/games/mojang/resource_packs.
 Select .modpkg file and it will install.
